purpose: To attract new customers by showcasing HubSpot's integrated platform, its various hubs, and AI capabilities, driving sign-ups for demos or free tools.
mainCTA: Get a demo; Get started free
importantSections: Hero section with main value proposition
Overview of HubSpot's Agentic Customer Platform (CRM, Products, AI)
Detailed breakdown of individual product Hubs
Built-in AI Agents (Customer, Prospecting, Data Agents)
summary: HubSpot's homepage promotes its 'Agentic Customer Platform' which unifies marketing, sales, and customer service with connected data and AI tools. It highlights various product hubs, AI agents, customer success stories, and offers options to get a demo or start for free to help businesses grow and scale.
visualLayout: Hero section with full-width image, headline, and two CTAs; horizontal strip of customer logos; product overview section with a visual representation of connected products and a carousel; grid layout showcasing individual product hubs; distinct section with a gradient background for AI agents and a carousel; integrations text section; testimonials/case studies section with customer quotes and metrics; final CTA section with a dark background; multi-column footer.
colorScheme: Dominant colors are white for backgrounds, dark grey/black for text and footer, and bright orange for CTAs and accents. An accent gradient of light pink/peach is used for the AI agents section. The overall styling is clean, modern, and professional with bold typography.
